title: Fix Excel download bug and restore Indonesian UI language

requirements.text: Fix the downloaded Excel (.xlsx) file so it can be opened correctly in Excel and compatible spreadsheet applications. The file generated by the custom XLSX writer in frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts must produce a valid, non-corrupt .xlsx file that opens without errors.

quotes: untuk file yang diunduh belum bisa dibuka

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the export/download button on the Inventory page generates a .xlsx file that opens successfully in Microsoft Excel.
The downloaded file opens successfully in LibreOffice Calc without errors.
All inventory data rows and headers are present and correctly formatted in the opened file.
The ZIP/zlib structure, CRC32/Adler32 checksums, and Office Open XML parts in xlsx.ts are valid and well-formed.

requirements.text: Ensure all user-facing text across the entire application uses Indonesian language only. Any English labels, button text, headings, table headers, placeholder text, error messages, toast notifications, or dialog content that was introduced or changed in the recent update must be reverted or translated to Indonesian, consistent with the language used before the latest changes.

quotes: untuk basa yang dipakai Bahasa indonesia saja seperti sebelumnya

acceptanceCriteria: All page titles, navigation labels, and sidebar links are displayed in Indonesian.
All button labels (e.g., add, save, delete, export, import, download template) are in Indonesian.
All table column headers on the Inventory, Transactions, and Reports pages are in Indonesian.
All form field labels and placeholder text are in Indonesian.
All toast/notification messages (success, error, warning) are in Indonesian.
All dialog and modal content (titles, descriptions, confirm/cancel buttons) are in Indonesian.
No English text is visible to the end user anywhere in the application.

constraints: Do not change the backend data model or Motoko actor logic.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
The Excel export must remain dependency-free (no external npm xlsx libraries); fix must be within frontend/src/lib/xlsx.ts or the call site.
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond fixing the Excel download bug and restoring Indonesian language.
Changing the overall UI design, color scheme, or layout.
Adding multi-language / i18n support; Indonesian is the only required language.
